title: The Wandering Merchant
openingText: Aldric spreads his hands across a table covered in goods and ledgers. 'You've caught me at a good time,' he says. 'I've wares and I've needs, and I suspect we might find some common ground. Let's talk terms.'
dialogueCordial: Now this I can work with. You drive a fair bargain — I'll remember this.
dialogueStrained: I hear you. Whether I agree is another matter.
dialogueHostile: Watch yourself. I've dealt with rougher than you, and I didn't get rich by being pushed around.
dialogueWalkaway: This isn't worth my time. Good day.
dialogueAccept: Pleasure doing business. Come find me again when you need something.

terms.description: Aldric will pay 50 gold for safe passage intel about the region.
Future goods from Aldric are sold at a 10% discount (tracked as faction rep).
A 'processing fee' of 15 gold — buried in the small print.
